summary: Tested Farewell page fixes per user complaint. All critical requirements PASS: No inappropriate 'fun/party/social butterfly' text, memorial-appropriate language used, Services section titled 'Compassionate Support' without prices (hidePrice=true), removed duplicate product sections. One data issue: Only 1 memorial bundle in database (needs 2 more seeded).

minor.issue: Only 1 bundle seeded to database. Static code has 3 bundles (Forever in Heart, Precious Memories, Loving Tribute) but only 1 is in DB. Need to seed the 2 additional bundles.

action_items: Seed 2 additional memorial bundles to database: 'farewell-keepsake-bundle' (Precious Memories Bundle) and 'farewell-tribute-bundle' (Loving Tribute Bundle) - these are defined in CuratedBundles.jsx lines 132-151 but not in the bundles collection
critical_code_review_comments: FarewellPage.jsx: Correctly uses ServiceCatalogSection with hidePrice={true} and title='Compassionate Support'
FarewellPage.jsx: Correctly removed duplicate sections (BreedSmart, ArchetypeProducts, PersonalizedPicks, MiraCuratedLayer, PillarPicksSection)
CuratedBundles.jsx: 3 memorial bundles correctly defined in PILLAR_BUNDLES.farewell with memorial-appropriate copy
archetypeCopy.js: FAREWELL_COPY added with memorial language - 'Forever in our hearts', 'Honoring memory', 'Cherishing legacy' - NOT using party/fun language
SoulMadeCollection.jsx: Uses getPillarAwareProductIntro() which returns farewell-specific copy

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All UI tests pass, data seeding issue for bundles

seed_data_creation: Need to seed 2 more farewell bundles: Precious Memories Bundle, Loving Tribute Bundle
